entities.name: STRIGA GESNERIOIDES
entities.description: A major destructive parasitic weed of cowpea that causes substantial yield reduction

entities.name: COWPEA
entities.description: The host crop (Vigna unguiculata) affected by Striga gesnerioides

entities.name: YIELD REDUCTION
entities.description: The decrease in crop productivity caused by parasitic weed infestation

entities.name: WEST AND CENTRAL AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region where Striga gesnerioides causes substantial yield reduction in cowpea

entities.name: VIRULENT RACES
entities.description: Different strains within the parasite population that contribute to genotype x environment interaction

entities.name: GENOTYPE X ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between genetic makeup and environmental factors affecting crop performance

entities.name: DURABLE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a genotype to maintain resistance to a parasite across different environments

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: The country where the 3-year study on cowpea and Striga was conducted

entities.name: DRY SAVANNA AGRO-ECOLOGY
entities.description: The specific environmental condition in Nigeria where Striga gesnerioides is endemic

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The primary measure of cowpea productivity used for analysis

entities.name: YIELD COMPONENTS
entities.description: Specific metrics that contribute to the overall grain yield of cowpea

entities.name: ANOVA
entities.description: Analysis of variance used to analyze grain yield and yield components data

entities.name: GGE BIPLOT ANALYSIS
entities.description: Genotype main effect plus genotype x environment analysis used to rank genotypes and examine multi-environment trial data

entities.name: UAM09 1046-6-1 (V7)
entities.description: A cowpea genotype identified as ideal and adapted to a wide range of locations

entities.name: UAM09 1046-6-2 (V8)
entities.description: A cowpea genotype identified as ideal and adapted to a wide range of locations

entities.name: TILLA
entities.description: The most repeatable and ideal location for selecting cowpea genotypes for resistance to Striga gesnerioides
